title: Goals - Beta. PLEASE ADD A FILTER!
excerpt:
Hi, 
The goals filter is great but it doesn’t give the option to filter and takes the sum from the whole board. Are their plans to make this more advanced? 
Thanks, 
Ruth

posts.author: RuthQ (Ruth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

The goals filter is great but it doesn’t give the option to filter and takes the sum from the whole board. Are their plans to make this more advanced?

Thanks,
Ruth

posts.author: Sanne (Malcorps)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, I noticed there is still no option to filter. Or at least, the filters do not work. Is this being worked on? Thanks!

posts.author: Liz_H (Elizabeth Hallett)
posts.cookedHtml: Just trying this and it looks like the filters may work when a dashboard is added to the board rather than adding a dashboard board. Not great when wanting to get an overview, but something.
